en.commentary: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select keeps first because the SCA-certified brewing temperature window and the 15-year typical lifespan still close the case for anyone who actually takes drip coffee seriously. Memorial Day pre-deal pricing leaked yesterday with Sur La Table putting the KBGV Select at $329 (down from $379), which is the lowest non-Black Friday price of the year. Breville Precision Brewer Thermal at second remains the right answer for coffee nerds who want bloom-time control and pour-over emulation. Fellow Aiden at third is genuinely the most exciting product in the drip-coffee category in five years, and the May 6 firmware update added the Coffee World Championships profile pack, which makes Aiden's $415 price more defensible. Ratio Six at four still earns its $475 on the strength of the build quality and the half-batch mode that no competitor matches. The 5/8 read is that the top of the category is stable, and the only buying decision is whether you want SCA-certified simplicity (Moccamaster) or programmable nerd-out potential (Aiden).

highlights.title: Moccamaster KBGV at $329 is the lowest non-Black Friday price of the year
highlights.body: Sur La Table's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring sale this year. SCA-certified brewing window, 15-year lifespan, and Dutch-built reliability at $329 puts the value argument firmly on Moccamaster. Anyone who has been waiting to upgrade should buy this week.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden firmware update on May 6 added the World Championships profile pack
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware adds licensed brewing profiles from the World Brewers Cup champions, which is something no other drip machine in the category offers. For coffee buyers who genuinely care about extraction parameters, Aiden is now the most capable drip machine ever sold to consumers.

highlights.title: Ratio Six is still the best-built drip machine money can buy
highlights.body: The half-batch mode handles 4-cup brews without losing extraction quality, which is the one thing every other premium drip machine messes up. The build quality justifies $475 for buyers who want a 20-year piece of equipment, and Ratio's lifetime warranty backs that up.

zh-tw.commentary:
Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select 第一名守住，SCA 認證的萃取溫度區間跟 15 年使用壽命真的把所有正經對待手沖咖啡的買家圈起來。Memorial Day 預告價昨天傳出來，Sur La Table 把 KBGV Select 砍到 $329（原價 $379），是今年非黑五最低價。

台灣公司貨 NT$13,500 上下這個定位略偏高，但荷蘭製造、能用 15 年這個 CP 值算下來真的划算，咖啡老饕家裡放一台用很久。

第二名 Breville Precision Brewer Thermal 還是想要綻放時間控制跟手沖模擬的咖啡發燒友首選。

第三名 Fellow Aiden 是過去五年滴漏咖啡品類最有意思的新產品，5/6 韌體更新加了世界沖煮大賽冠軍配方包，這件事讓 Aiden 的 $415 定價變得合理很多。在意萃取參數的咖啡買家，這台是史上消費級最強滴漏機。

第四名 Ratio Six 還是值得它的 $475，半量模式做 4 杯不會掉萃取率，其他高階滴漏機在這件事上都會出包。整體前三穩定，買的選擇就是要 SCA 認證的簡單可靠（Moccamaster）還是要可程式化發燒玩法（Aiden）。

highlights.title: Moccamaster KBGV $329 是今年非黑五最低價
highlights.body: Sur La Table Memorial Day 預告價贏過今年所有春季促銷。SCA 認證萃取窗口、15 年使用壽命、荷蘭工藝在這個價碼整個 CP 值論述完全壓在 Moccamaster 那邊。一直在等升級的人，這週直接下手不用猶豫。

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden 5/6 韌體更新加入世界沖煮冠軍配方包
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體加上世界沖煮大賽冠軍授權配方，這件事在滴漏機品類沒人做過。真的在意萃取參數的咖啡買家，Aiden 現在是消費級史上最強滴漏機。

highlights.title: Ratio Six 還是錢能買到工藝最頂的滴漏機
highlights.body: 半量模式做 4 杯不掉萃取率，這件事所有其他高階滴漏機都做不好。要花 NT$15,000 找一台用 20 年的設備，Ratio 終身保固背書讓這個論述站得住腳。

en.commentary: Viofo A329S keeps first because the Sony STARVIS 2 IMX678 sensor and the genuine 4K HDR pipeline are still the spec combination no other dash cam under $400 has matched. Viofo announced May 7 that the U.S. Memorial Day price will be $279.99, which beats the launch price by $50 and locks the first-place ranking through May. Vantrue N4 Pro S at second remains the right answer for anyone who genuinely needs interior cabin recording for rideshare or fleet work, and Vantrue's three-channel system is the only one that handles cabin IR plus front 4K plus rear 1440p without compression artifacts. BlackVue Elite 9 2CH at third still earns its $599 for parking surveillance use cases, the LTE-connected cloud upload is genuinely best in class. Garmin Dash Cam Mini 3 at four is the best small unit if you specifically want something invisible behind the rearview mirror. The 5/8 read is that the category is stable, the Viofo Memorial Day cut closes the value argument decisively, and the only real shift will be Q3 when Nextbase launches their threatened iQ 2K successor.

highlights.title: Viofo A329S Memorial Day price at $279.99 closes the value argument
highlights.body: Viofo announced May 7 the official U.S. Memorial Day price beats launch by $50. STARVIS 2 IMX678 sensor and 4K HDR at $280 is something no competitor has matched at any price under $400, and the value argument is now decisive through May.

highlights.title: Vantrue N4 Pro S is the only three-channel I'd recommend for rideshare
highlights.body: Cabin IR plus front 4K plus rear 1440p without compression artifacts is the spec combination Uber and Lyft drivers actually need, and Vantrue is the only manufacturer who ships it without compromise. For rideshare and fleet use cases, this is the unambiguous recommendation.

highlights.title: BlackVue Elite 9 LTE-connected parking mode is best in class
highlights.body: For parking-surveillance use cases where the dash cam needs to upload incident clips while the car is unattended, BlackVue's cloud system is the only one that genuinely works reliably. The $599 premium plus the cloud subscription are worth it for vehicles parked on city streets.

zh-tw.commentary:
Viofo A329S 第一名守住，Sony STARVIS 2 IMX678 感光元件加上真 4K HDR 流程，這個規格組合在 $400 以下品類還是沒有對手。Viofo 5/7 公告美國 Memorial Day 定價 $279.99，比上市價便宜 $50，把第一名鎖到 5 月底。

台灣公司貨 NT$8,990 上下，這個價碼裝完全套件還能幫你解決雙鏡頭跟降壓線問題，CP 值真的爆表。

第二名 Vantrue N4 Pro S 是真的需要車內錄影的 Uber 司機跟營業車隊唯一首選。三鏡頭系統做到車內 IR 紅外線加前 4K 加後 1440p 都不掉壓縮品質，沒有對手做得到。

第三名 BlackVue Elite 9 2CH 在停車監控用途還是值得它 $599，LTE 雲端上傳是業界最穩的。台灣會買這台的多半是高價車車主，路邊停車怕被 A 到要有遠端證據。

第四名 Garmin Dash Cam Mini 3 適合非要藏在後照鏡後面看不到的人。整個排行 5/8 沒變動，Viofo 的 Memorial Day 砍價直接把價值論述鎖死，下一個變數要等到 Q3 Nextbase 公告的 iQ 2K 後繼機。

highlights.title: Viofo A329S Memorial Day $279.99 把價值論述鎖死
highlights.body: Viofo 5/7 公告美國 Memorial Day 官方定價比上市便宜 $50。STARVIS 2 IMX678 感光加 4K HDR 在 $280（約 NT$8,800），這個規格在 $400 以下沒有任何競品做得出來。整個 5 月價值論述完全壓在 Viofo 那邊。

highlights.title: Vantrue N4 Pro S 是 Uber 司機唯一值得推的三鏡頭
highlights.body: 車內 IR 加前 4K 加後 1440p 都不掉壓縮品質，這個規格組合 Uber 跟 Lyft 司機實際要的就是這套，沒有其他廠商做出來。營業車跟車隊用途，推薦毫無懸念。

highlights.title: BlackVue Elite 9 LTE 連線停車模式是業界最穩
highlights.body: 車主沒在車上的時候要把事故片段上傳雲端，BlackVue 雲端系統是唯一真的能跑穩的。$599 溢價加雲端訂閱，對停在街邊的高價車車主來說值得。

en.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite (2025) keeps first because the 7-inch 300 ppi screen and the page-turn speed bump from the new Mediatek SoC are still the most-improved-overall e-reader of the past three years. Amazon's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with Paperwhite at $129.99 (regular $159.99), which is the lowest the 2025 model has been since launch and which closes the value argument. Kobo Libra Colour at second is still the right answer for anyone serious about library lending or PDF annotation, and the May 6 firmware update added EPUB-from-Google-Drive direct sync, which Amazon will not match. Kindle Colorsoft at third is the dark horse this season, the latest Colorsoft refresh ships with the e-ink Kaleido 4 panel that finally makes color e-reading not feel like a compromise. Boox Note Air 4 C at four is the productivity pick for anyone who wants color e-ink plus pen input. The 5/8 takeaway is that the top of the category is stable, the Paperwhite Memorial Day price locks first place, and Kobo's Google Drive sync is the underrated story of the week.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite at $129.99 is the lowest the 2025 model has been
highlights.body: Amazon's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring sale this year. 7-inch 300 ppi screen and the new Mediatek page-turn speed at $130 closes the value argument decisively. For anyone who has been waiting on a Paperwhite upgrade, this is the price to buy at.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour adds EPUB-from-Google-Drive direct sync on May 6
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update enables direct EPUB sync from Google Drive without going through Kobo desktop. This is the kind of open-format support Amazon will never ship, and it cements Kobo's position as the e-reader for buyers who refuse to live entirely inside Amazon's ecosystem.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft with Kaleido 4 finally makes color e-reading not feel like a compromise
highlights.body: The Kaleido 4 panel pushes color saturation past the threshold where comic books and color magazine layouts read as intended rather than washed out. For graphic-novel readers and cookbook owners this is the first color e-reader I'd actually recommend, and the $279 price tag is now defensible.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite (2025) 第一名守住，7 吋 300 ppi 螢幕跟新的 Mediatek SoC 翻頁速度提升，過去三年改最多的電子閱讀器還是它。Amazon Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動，Paperwhite $129.99（原價 $159.99），是 2025 版上市以來最低，整個價值論述鎖死。

台灣 Amazon 海運過來大概 NT$5,500 上下，沒有公司貨但社群買的人很多，捷運通勤族手上看得到的閱讀器幾乎一半是這台。

第二名 Kobo Libra Colour 對在意圖書館借閱跟 PDF 標註的人還是首選，5/6 韌體更新加了 EPUB 從 Google Drive 直接同步，這件事 Amazon 永遠不會做。台灣 Readmoo 跟博客來上架的 EPUB 直接丟雲端就同步進來，重度自學族群很受用。

第三名 Kindle Colorsoft 是這季的黑馬，最新刷的 Colorsoft 換上 Kaleido 4 彩色 e-ink 面板，彩色閱讀終於不再有妥協感。

第四名 Boox Note Air 4 C 是想要彩色 e-ink 加筆記功能的生產力選擇。整體前三穩定，Paperwhite 的 Memorial Day 價就是一定要下手的訊號，Kobo 的 Google Drive 同步是這週被低估的大事。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite $129.99 是 2025 版上市以來最低
highlights.body: Amazon Memorial Day 預告價贏過今年所有春季促銷。7 吋 300 ppi 螢幕加新版 Mediatek 翻頁速度在 $130（約 NT$4,090）整個價值論述完全壓死。一直在等 Paperwhite 升級的人這週直接下手就對。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 5/6 加 Google Drive 直接同步 EPUB
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 EPUB 直接從 Google Drive 同步進來，不用再透過 Kobo 桌面 App。這種開放格式支援 Amazon 永遠不會做，這個更新把 Kobo 在拒絕被 Amazon 鎖死的買家市場的位置鞏固住。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 換 Kaleido 4 終於讓彩色電子閱讀不再有妥協感
highlights.body: Kaleido 4 面板把色彩飽和度推過漫畫跟彩色雜誌排版讀起來該有的標準，舊版 Colorsoft 那種洗白感不見了。漫畫讀者跟食譜書愛好者這群人，這是第一台我會真的推薦的彩色電子閱讀器。

en.commentary: Aventon Level 3 keeps first because the May 6 firmware update added the new ABS-tuned regenerative braking that nobody else in the commuter class ships, and at $1,999 the value argument was already decisive before that. Lectric XP4 750 at second is still the right answer for buyers who want folding plus Class 3 throttle in one package under $1,300, and Lectric's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle already kicked off with the XP4 at $1,099 yesterday. Trek FX+ 7 Discover 3 at third is the unambiguous pick for anyone who wants the e-bike to feel like a regular bike rather than a moped, and the lighter weight is genuinely the differentiator at this price tier. Ride1Up Cafe Cruiser at fifth is the underrated value play for casual riders. The 5/8 read is that the commuter e-bike market is stable, Aventon's regen-braking firmware update is genuinely the most consequential update in the category this quarter, and Memorial Day will see meaningful discounts only on Lectric and the value tier.

highlights.title: Aventon Level 3 May 6 firmware adds ABS-tuned regenerative braking
highlights.body: Regenerative braking with ABS tuning at this price point is something no commuter e-bike under $2,500 ships. The May 6 firmware update on the Level 3 closes the safety gap with premium German e-bikes that cost twice as much. First place is locked through May.

highlights.title: Lectric XP4 at $1,099 Memorial Day price is the folding king
highlights.body: Lectric's Memorial Day pre-deal kicked off yesterday with the XP4 at $1,099, which beats the launch price by $200. Folding plus Class 3 throttle plus 750W motor at this price point is genuinely uncontested in the value tier, and the apartment-storage use case alone justifies the recommendation.

highlights.title: Trek FX+ 7 Discover 3 is the only e-bike that feels like a real bike
highlights.body: Lightweight chassis at 36 lbs and the smaller integrated motor make the Discover 3 the only option for buyers who want pedal-assist help without the e-bike feeling like a moped. For experienced cyclists adding e-assist for hills, this is the pick that justifies the $3,499 premium.

zh-tw.commentary:
Aventon Level 3 第一名守住，5/6 韌體更新加了 ABS 調校的回充式煞車，這個功能在通勤級電動腳踏車品類沒有對手做。$1,999（約 NT$62,900）這個定價在更新前就已經把價值論述鎖死。

台灣公司貨 Aventon 走進口路線，Level 3 大約 NT$72,900，雖然比美國貴一截但保固穩。捷運末端通勤族用得很順。

第二名 Lectric XP4 750 在「折疊加 Class 3 油門」這個組合 $1,300 以下還是沒對手，Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 XP4 殺到 $1,099。

第三名 Trek FX+ 7 Discover 3 是想要電動車騎起來像「真的腳踏車」而非機車的人唯一選擇，整車 36 lbs（約 16 kg）的輕量化在這個價位真的有差。

第五名 Ride1Up Cafe Cruiser 是休閒騎乘的被低估性價比選擇。整個排行 5/8 不變動，Aventon 的回充式煞車韌體是這品類本季最重要的更新，Memorial Day 真的會降的只有 Lectric 跟性價比段。

highlights.title: Aventon Level 3 5/6 韌體加入 ABS 調校回充式煞車
highlights.body: 在這個價位帶內附 ABS 調校回充式煞車，$2,500 以下通勤車品類沒人做得到。5/6 韌體更新把 Level 3 的安全規格拉到要花兩倍價錢買德系才有的水準。第一名 5 月鎖死。

highlights.title: Lectric XP4 Memorial Day $1,099 是折疊王
highlights.body: Lectric Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 XP4 殺到 $1,099，比上市價便宜 $200。折疊加 Class 3 油門加 750W 馬達在這個價位真的沒對手，光是套房可以收進衣櫃這個用途就值得推薦。

highlights.title: Trek FX+ 7 Discover 3 是唯一一台騎起來像真的腳踏車的電動車
highlights.body: 輕量化車架 36 lbs（約 16 kg）加小型整合式馬達，是唯一一台能讓買家有電動輔助但騎起來不像機車的選擇。已經是腳踏車老手要加電動輔助上坡的人，$3,499（約 NT$110,000）這個溢價值得。

en.commentary: Ninebot MAX G3 stays first because the 25-mile real-world range, the 22 mph top speed, and the dual suspension still close the case for any serious commuter under $1,300. Segway-Ninebot's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the G3 at $999 (regular $1,099), which is the cheapest the G3 has been since launch and locks first place through May. Apollo City Pro at second is the right answer for anyone who genuinely needs the dual-motor torque for hill-heavy commutes, and Apollo's three-year warranty is still the best in the category. NIU KQi3 Pro at third is the value tier winner under $700, and NIU's app reliability has improved meaningfully since the spring 2025 firmware overhaul. Apollo Ghost at four is the enthusiast pick for off-road and 30+ mph performance. The 5/8 read is that the commuter scooter market is stable, the G3 Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news this week was Vmax's quiet exit from the U.S. market on May 6.

highlights.title: Ninebot MAX G3 at $999 Memorial Day price is the lock for first
highlights.body: Segway-Ninebot's Memorial Day pre-deal price is the cheapest the G3 has been since launch. 25-mile real-world range, 22 mph top speed, dual suspension at $999 closes the value argument for serious commuters, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro is the only scooter I'd recommend for hill-heavy commutes
highlights.body: Dual 500W motors with the torque profile tuned for grade climbing is the spec combination that handles San Francisco and Seattle commutes without losing speed on inclines. Apollo's three-year warranty is the longest in the category, and that backs the durability argument credibly.

highlights.title: Vmax exiting the U.S. market on May 6 reshapes the premium tier
highlights.body: Vmax's quiet exit from U.S. distribution on May 6 removes one of the few European-built premium scooters from the category. Anyone who was specifically waiting on a Vmax VX-2 should redirect to Apollo Ghost or the upcoming Inokim Ox 2026 model. The premium tier got narrower this week.

zh-tw.commentary:
Ninebot MAX G3 第一名穩住，25 英里（約 40 公里）實測續航、22 mph（約 35 km/h）最高速、前後雙避震，在 $1,300 以下這個級距還是把所有認真通勤的買家圈起來。Segway-Ninebot Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 G3 殺到 $999（原 $1,099），是上市以來最低。

台灣 Segway 公司貨 G3 約 NT$32,900，比美國貴一些但保固跟維修都穩，雙北通勤族買的人最多。

第二名 Apollo City Pro 是真的住在山坡多的地方（內湖、汐止那種），雙馬達扭力組合才推得上去。Apollo 三年保固是這品類最久的。

第三名 NIU KQi3 Pro 在 $700 以下還是性價比首選，NIU App 在 2025 春季韌體大改之後穩定度改善很多。

第四名 Apollo Ghost 是要越野跟 30 mph 以上的玩家機種。整個格局 5/8 不變動，G3 的 Memorial Day 價把價值論述鎖死，這週唯一的品類新聞是 Vmax 5/6 安靜地退出美國市場。

highlights.title: Ninebot MAX G3 Memorial Day $999 鎖死第一
highlights.body: Segway-Ninebot Memorial Day 預告價是 G3 上市以來最低。25 英里實測續航加 22 mph 加雙避震在 $999（約 NT$31,400）整個價值論述完全壓死，Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Apollo City Pro 是內湖汐止山坡通勤唯一推薦
highlights.body: 雙 500W 馬達加爬坡調校扭力曲線，是真的能在山坡多的路段不掉速的規格組合。Apollo 三年保固是這品類最長，對耐用度論述背書到位。

highlights.title: Vmax 5/6 退出美國市場讓高階段更窄
highlights.body: Vmax 5/6 安靜地撤出美國市場，少了一家歐系高階品牌。本來在等 Vmax VX-2 的人，現在請轉向 Apollo Ghost 或下半年要出的 Inokim Ox 2026 款。高階段這週變更窄了。

en.commentary: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 keeps first because the new titanium hinge generation has now logged six months of real-world use without the durability complaints that plagued the Fold 6, and the May 7 One UI update added the multi-task improvements that make the inner-display productivity story finally credible. Pixel 10 Pro Fold at second still earns its spot on the strength of Tensor G6 image processing and the cleanest Android-on-foldable software experience, but Google has not announced any Memorial Day pricing move, which means the value argument continues to favor the Z Fold 7. OPPO Find N5 at third remains the right answer for buyers in markets where it is officially sold, and the $1,599 import price puts it under both Samsung and Google flagships. Honor Magic V5 at fourth is the dark horse for buyers who genuinely care about hinge durability and the lightest book-style fold weight in the category. The 5/8 read is that the foldable market is stable through Memorial Day, Samsung's One UI improvements continue to widen the productivity moat, and the only real shift will be the rumored Z Fold 8 leak in Q3.

highlights.title: Samsung Z Fold 7 May 7 One UI update fixes the multitask story
highlights.body: The 7.1.1 update adds three-app simultaneous split-screen with proper resize handles and Samsung DeX integration that genuinely treats the inner display as a productivity device. After six months of post-launch refinement the Z Fold 7 is now the only foldable I'd recommend to someone who actually wants to work on the inner display.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold's image processing is the moat that keeps it second
highlights.body: Tensor G6 plus Google's computational photography pipeline produces inner-and-outer-display photo quality that Samsung and OPPO cannot match. For buyers who care about photography first and productivity second, the Pixel 10 Pro Fold is still the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: OPPO Find N5 imports at $1,599 are the value play in the foldable market
highlights.body: Where the Find N5 is officially sold or where buyers tolerate imports, the $1,599 price beats Samsung and Google flagships by $300+ for hardware that competes in the same tier. The hinge engineering and the inner display crease handling are genuinely best-in-class.

zh-tw.commentary:
Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 第一名穩住，新一代鈦合金鉸鏈現在已經有六個月真實使用回饋，沒再出現 Fold 6 那種耐用度抱怨。5/7 推送的 One UI 更新加上多工改進，內螢幕生產力這個論述終於說得通。

台灣公司貨 Z Fold 7 NT$57,900 起，雖然不便宜但售後維修體系做得最完整，鉸鏈出問題台灣三星直送修。

第二名 Pixel 10 Pro Fold 還是靠 Tensor G6 影像處理跟最乾淨的 Android 折疊機體驗在站。Google 這次沒有發 Memorial Day 折扣動作，價值論述還是 Samsung 那邊比較好。台灣沒有公司貨，要找海運。

第三名 OPPO Find N5 在有官方銷售的市場（中國跟部分東南亞）還是最值得買的，台灣只能找代購大概 NT$50,000 以內，比 Samsung 跟 Google 旗艦都便宜。

第四名 Honor Magic V5 是真的在意鉸鏈耐用度跟最輕書本式折疊重量的人會看的選擇。整個格局 5/8 穩定，到 Memorial Day 不會變，下一個變數是 Q3 傳出的 Z Fold 8 規格洩漏。

highlights.title: Samsung Z Fold 7 5/7 One UI 更新修好多工故事
highlights.body: 7.1.1 版本加上三個 App 同時分割顯示加上正常的 resize 控制，Samsung DeX 整合終於真的把內螢幕當生產力裝置處理。上市六個月磨完之後，Z Fold 7 現在是唯一一台我真的會推薦給「要在內螢幕上工作」的人的折疊機。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold 影像處理是守第二的護城河
highlights.body: Tensor G6 加 Google 計算攝影流程，內外螢幕的照片品質是 Samsung 跟 OPPO 都追不上的。攝影需求優先生產力其次的買家，Pixel 10 Pro Fold 還是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: OPPO Find N5 海運 NT$50,000 是折疊機性價比之王
highlights.body: 在有官方代理的市場或能接受海運的買家，Find N5 比 Samsung 跟 Google 旗艦便宜超過 NT$10,000，硬體規格還在同個等級競爭。鉸鏈工程跟內螢幕折痕處理真的是同級最好。

en.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 2022 Series keeps first because the four-year track record on the magnetic head pillow and the cold-cure foam is now long enough to make any value argument on cheaper chairs collapse on durability grounds. Secretlab's Memorial Day pre-deal kicked off yesterday with the Titan Evo at $479 (regular $549), which is the cheapest the 2022 Series has been since the holiday 2024 cycle and which locks first place through May. Razer Vantum at second is still the right answer for buyers who want premium materials with active lumbar support, but the $1,099 price tag makes it a niche pick. Branch Omni Dynamic Ergonomic Chair at third remains my pick for buyers who want a real office ergonomic chair that handles 8-hour work plus gaming without the usual gamer-chair aesthetic. The 5/8 read is that this category is the most stable on the site, the Titan Evo Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and there is no meaningful update expected before Q3 when Secretlab's Titan Evo 2026 successor is rumored to land.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo at $479 is the cheapest since holiday 2024
highlights.body: Secretlab's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. Four years of magnetic-head-pillow-and-cold-cure-foam track record at this price closes the value argument decisively, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Branch Omni Dynamic is the only gaming chair I'd recommend for 8-hour work
highlights.body: The dynamic lumbar support and the executive-office aesthetic make the Omni the only chair in the category that handles a full work-from-home day plus evening gaming without lower-back fatigue. For buyers who refuse to put a gamer-aesthetic chair in their office, this is the pick.

highlights.title: Razer Vantum's $1,099 price is only justified for active-lumbar buyers
highlights.body: The active lumbar support is genuinely the best in any gaming chair, but the $1,099 entry price puts it in territory where the value argument requires a specific lower-back medical concern to justify. For most buyers the Titan Evo at half the price is the smarter call.

zh-tw.commentary:
Secretlab Titan Evo 2022 Series 第一名守住，磁吸式頭枕跟冷固記憶棉的四年使用記錄，已經長到任何便宜椅子要在耐用度上跟它打的論述都站不住腳。Secretlab Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Titan Evo 殺到 $479（原 $549），是 2024 年聖誕節以來最低價。

台灣公司貨 Titan Evo NT$15,800 起，比美國貴一截但 5 年保固在台灣可以實際走，這個保固在這個價位的椅子真的是業界最好。

第二名 Razer Vantum 還是想要旗艦材質加主動腰靠的人首選，但 $1,099（約 NT$34,500）把它定價放在需要特殊腰部需求才會合理的位置。

第三名 Branch Omni Dynamic Ergonomic Chair 還是我推給「要在家工作 8 小時又要打電動」的人的選擇，動態腰靠加行政辦公椅外觀，不用在客廳擺一張電競風格的椅子。

整個排行 5/8 不變動，這個品類是這週最穩的，下一個變數要等 Q3 傳出的 Titan Evo 2026 後繼款。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo $479 是 2024 聖誕節以來最低
highlights.body: Secretlab Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 年所有春季促銷一大截。磁吸式頭枕跟冷固記憶棉四年使用紀錄在這個價位（約 NT$15,100）整個價值論述完全壓死，Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Branch Omni Dynamic 是唯一推給「在家工作 8 小時加打電動」的椅子
highlights.body: 動態腰靠加行政辦公椅外觀，是這個品類唯一能撐一整個 work-from-home 加上晚間遊戲不會腰酸背痛的椅子。客廳辦公室不想擺電競風格椅子的人，這就是首選。

highlights.title: Razer Vantum $1,099 只有特定腰部需求才合理
highlights.body: 主動腰靠真的是電競椅裡最好的，但 $1,099（約 NT$34,500）放在這個價位帶要有腰椎醫療顧慮才合理。一般買家直接 Titan Evo 半價就解決，沒必要花這個錢。

en.commentary: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless keeps first because the dual-battery system and the active noise cancellation tuned for esports are still the spec combination no competitor has matched at this price tier. SteelSeries' Memorial Day pre-deal kicked off yesterday with the Nova Pro Wireless at $279.99 (regular $349.99), which is the cheapest the Nova Pro has been since launch and locks first place through May. Audeze Maxwell 2 at second remains the right answer for anyone who genuinely cares about audio quality first and headset features second, the planar magnetic drivers produce sound stage no gaming-tuned dynamic driver can match. Turtle Beach Stealth Pro II at third is the multi-platform pick that handles PC plus PS5 plus Xbox without compromise. Razer BlackShark V3 Pro at four is still the lightest premium headset for long sessions. The 5/8 read is that the category is stable, the Nova Pro Memorial Day price closes the value argument decisively, and Memorial Day will see meaningful discounts only at the SteelSeries and Razer tiers.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Nova Pro Wireless at $279.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: SteelSeries' Memorial Day pre-deal price beats the holiday 2025 cycle by $20. Dual-battery hot-swap, active noise cancellation tuned for esports, and parametric EQ at $280 closes the value argument decisively, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Audeze Maxwell 2 is the only gaming headset audiophiles should buy
highlights.body: Planar magnetic drivers in a wireless gaming form factor is something no other manufacturer ships at this price point. The sound stage and instrument separation make it the unambiguous pick for anyone who treats gaming and music listening as overlapping use cases.

highlights.title: Turtle Beach Stealth Pro II is the multi-platform sweet spot
highlights.body: Dual wireless transmitters out of the box plus Bluetooth means the Stealth Pro II handles PC, PS5, Xbox, and Switch without manual repairing every session. For multi-platform households this is the headset that actually delivers on the marketing claim.

zh-tw.commentary:
SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless 第一名守住，雙電池系統加上電競調校的主動降噪，這個規格組合在這個價位帶還是沒有對手做。SteelSeries Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Nova Pro Wireless 殺到 $279.99（原 $349.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 Nova Pro Wireless NT$11,990 起，比美國貴但保固穩，PS5 玩家買的最多。

第二名 Audeze Maxwell 2 還是真的在意音質第一、耳機功能第二的人首選。平面振膜驅動單體做出來的聲場是電競調校的動圈式驅動單體做不到的。

第三名 Turtle Beach Stealth Pro II 是多平台買家首選，盒裝就附雙無線發射器加藍牙，PC、PS5、Xbox、Switch 都不用每次手動重新配對。

第四名 Razer BlackShark V3 Pro 還是長時間遊戲時最輕的旗艦耳機。整個 5/8 排行不變動，Nova Pro 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，Memorial Day 會真的降價的只有 SteelSeries 跟 Razer 級距。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Nova Pro Wireless $279.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: SteelSeries Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2025 聖誕節週期再降 $20。雙電池熱抽換、電競主動降噪、參數式 EQ 在 $280（約 NT$8,800）整個價值論述完全壓死，Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Audeze Maxwell 2 是唯一發燒友該買的電競耳機
highlights.body: 平面振膜驅動單體做成無線電競外型，這件事沒人在這個價位做。聲場跟樂器分離度讓它是「電競跟音樂聆聽是重疊用途」的買家唯一選擇。

highlights.title: Turtle Beach Stealth Pro II 是多平台甜蜜點
highlights.body: 盒裝就附雙無線發射器加藍牙，PC、PS5、Xbox、Switch 都不用每次手動重新配對。多平台家庭這個用途，Stealth Pro II 是唯一真的把行銷話術做出來的耳機。
